title: Bigger Eyes On Baby Piglins
description: Makes the eyes on Baby Piglins bigger.
body:
This resource pack adds bigger eyes to the new Baby Piglins, inspired by the Piglin Runts in Minecraft Legends.

![This image shows the new textures for the Baby Piglins, showing their larger eyes that are included in the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70c8e91271fdd3b4cb097605b11d289c032b4564.png)
